subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Asadu'llah! Many papers are being dispatched; there is no opportunity for detailed exposition. The port [untranslated] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا سید اسدالله اوراق بسیاری ارسال میگردد فرصت تفصیل نیست بندر جز صحیح
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @review of publications
